[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00001000 1
5 00010001 2
6 10101010 4
7 00011000 2

01 00001010 2
12 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3
23 00100010 2
34 10000000 1
45 01110110 5
56 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3
67 00010101 3
70 11100000 3

13 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3
24 10000000 1
35 11010000 3
46 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3
57 00000001 1

71 11101010 5

47 00010101 3
50 00000001 1
61 11101110 6
72 01000000 1

04 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3
15 00010000 1
26 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3
37 00010001 2 match 5
40 01100101 4

73 00100010 2

16 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3

07 00010000 1

54 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3

76 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3
